responseText:
Scheduled it successfully as label `gold_rate_2min` for agent `@assistant` with cron `*/2 * * * *` (every 2 minutes), and confirmed it shows up in `schedule.sh list`.

Note: the schedule tool here doesn’t support a timezone argument; for an every-2-minutes schedule, `Asia/Karachi` won’t change the firing cadence anyway. If you want, I can add an `add` alias + timezone handling to match your exact `./scripts/schedule.sh add ...` command format.
